use_cases: Displaying multi-phase service workflows with associated metrics and KPIs
Presenting process documentation in a scannable card-based format
Showcasing delivery methodology for consulting or agency services
Organizing feature or product capabilities in digestible blocks
Highlighting workflow stages with contextual statistics
ai_summary: A monochrome bento-grid layout component designed to showcase service delivery workflows and methodologies. Displays five process phases (Discovery, Design, Build, Validation, Evolution) as styled cards with titles, descriptions, and associated metrics. Uses a dark color scheme with variant animations (orbit, relay, wave, spark, loop) to differentiate card types. Includes supplementary metrics display for delivery statistics. Suitable for SaaS products, dev-tools, or agency service presentations requiring structured process documentation.
